data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin Erase Gains Even As Trump Reiterates 'Crypto Capital' Pledge: Arthur Hayes Says 'Odds Are Shifting More Bullish' For BTC
data.description: Leading cryptocurrencies pulled back Thursday despite President Donald Trump's supportive remarks for the industry at an event.

data.title: Apple Stock Down Over 12% This Year — Now Tim Cook Is Reportedly Betting On Vision Pro's Mike Rockwell To Fix Siri After Losing Confidence In AI Boss John Giannandrea
data.description: Apple CEO Tim Cook has reportedly reassigned Vision Pro chief Mike Rockwell to lead Siri, signaling a major AI leadership shake-up after months of delays and a 12% stock decline shook investor confidence.

data.title: Cathie Wood Bets On Elon Musk's Tesla Despite Cybertruck Recall, Dumps Zuckerberg's Meta Shares Again
data.description: On Thursday, March 20, 2025, Cathie Wood's Ark Invest purchases $2.2M in Tesla shares despite Cybertruck recalls and financial concerns, while simultaneously selling $2.7M of Meta stock amid the company's privacy challenges.

data.title: Billionaire Stanley Druckenmiller Boosts US Steel Stake By 143%: Is He Betting On Merger?
data.description: Druckenmiller increased stake in United States Steel as company explores merger options. Company's stock up 25% due to Trump's tariffs.

data.title: Record-Breaking High-Risk Bitcoin Whale Allegedly Outed As UK Fraudster With Casino Theft History
data.description: On-chain investigator ZachXBT has linked the Hyperliquid whale, a trader who profited $20 million through high-leverage crypto trades, to a British online fraudster.
